title: Kuchesar Fort
tagline: Kuchesar Fort — heritage city of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Kuchesar Fort (alternatively known as Rao Raj Vilas Kuchesar Fort) is located at Kuchesar, in Bulandshahr, Uttar Pradesh, India, approximately 84.3 kilometers (52.4 miles) east of
overview.description: Kuchesar Fort (alternatively known as Rao Raj Vilas Kuchesar Fort) is located at Kuchesar, in Bulandshahr, Uttar Pradesh, India, approximately 84.3 kilometers (52.4 miles) east of Delhi. The fort was historically part of the Kuchesar estate, ruled by Jat 'Rajas'. In 2007, the fort was restored and turned into a hotel by Ajit Singh known as the Rao Raj Vilas Fort Kuchesar or Rao Raj Vilas, and has become a popular tourist attraction for the city. The resort preserves the fort's mid-18th century influences and reflects the vibrant mix of cultures.

topPlaces.name: Kuchesar
topPlaces.description: Kuchesar (or Kuchchesar) is a town situated off the NH 24 in modern Bulandshahr district, Uttar Pradesh, India, 80 kilometres (50 mi) from Delhi.Kuchesar Fort was originally owned and ruled by a Taga Gaur Raja, who belonged to a powerful landed clan in the Upper Ganga–Yamuna Doab region. The Taga Gaur rulers of Kuchesar and nearby Jalalabad were considered influential local chieftains and were known for their administrative control over surrounding parganas.

topPlaces.name: Sega Jagatpur
topPlaces.description: Sega Jagatpur is a village in tehsil Siyana in the Bulandshahr district of Uttar Pradesh, India. The village is situated at the road which connects Lakhaoti to Saidpur, Bulandshahr.

topPlaces.name: Bhawan Bahadur Nagar
topPlaces.description: Bhawan Bahadur Nagar (B. B. Nagar) is a town and a Nagar panchayat in Bulandshahr district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. It is also a part of the National Capital Region of Delhi.

topPlaces.name: Sikhera
topPlaces.description: Sikhera is a village in Simbhaoli block of Hapur District in Uttar Pradesh state, India. This village has Tyagi community (Both Hindu Tyagi and Muslim Tyagi).

topPlaces.name: Babugarh
topPlaces.description: Babugarh Chavani is a town and a nagar panchayat in, near Hapur city in Hapur district, in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. Babugarh Chavani is located almost 7 km away from Hapur towards Holy Pilgrimage Garhmukteshwar after crossing toll bridge near village "Tatarpur & Simroli".

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kuchesar Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kuchesar Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kuchesar Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (83 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kuchesar Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kuchesar Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kuchesar Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Kuchesar Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kuchesar Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kuchesar, Sega Jagatpur, Bhawan Bahadur Nagar, Sikhera, Babugarh.
